meta.title: Military drone testing program may be behind New Jersey drone mystery
meta.description:
CORRECTION: NASA has reached out to us to state that they are not involved in the establishment of the drone testing corridor between Delaware and New Jersey. 

Per NASA: "NASA plays no part in the agreement to facilitate this corridor. AAM is an industry term referring to the testing and development of future airspace technologies and concepts. It is also the name of a NASA mission covering the same areas."

NASA also says their December 21, 2023 press release about drone tests in Langley, Virginia could not have been related to drone sightings over Langley AFB that same month because the release simply omitted the fact that the tests were actually conducted 3 months earlier, in September.

--BREAK--

After hundreds of reports of unusual drones flying over New Jersey and the surrounding areas, one little-discussed Air Force-led program may just be the answer we're looking for.
